sayukiutils.command.copyuuid.set.heldAir: You must hold an item in your main hand

sayukiutils.lan.clear.perWorld.question: Clear per-world LAN settings?
sayukiutils.lan.clear.global.question: Clear global LAN settings?
sayukiutils.lan.tunnel.ngrok.notFound: ngrok not found! Install ngrok from https://ngrok.com/download or check your PATH
sayukiutils.lan.explanation:
To allow/disallow a player (including yourself) to use commands, use the /op and /deop commands.
Tip: This works without opening to LAN as well!
You can also ban and whitelist players using the respective commands.
commands.publish.saved: Local game hosting settings saved with port %s and MOTD: %s
commands.publish.failed.port_change: Unable to change port, still listening on port %s
commands.ban.failed.host: Nothing changed. You cannot ban the server's host
commands.banip.failed.host: Nothing changed. You cannot ban the IP of the server's host
commands.whitelist.add.failed.host: You cannot whitelist the server's host
sayukiutils.help.title: §6=== SayukiUtils Help ===
sayukiutils.help.copyuuid.line: §e/sayukiutils copyuuid§r — Copy entity UUIDs by right-clicking
sayukiutils.help.copyuuid.title: §6/sayukiutils copyuuid§r — Copy UUID of any entity
sayukiutils.help.copyuuid.sub: §7toggle§r: enable/disable  §7set [item]§r: change trigger item  §7reset§r: reset to stick
sayukiutils.help.copyuuid.desc: Hold the trigger item (default: stick) and right-click an entity to copy its UUID.
sayukiutils.help.copyuuid.toggle: §e  toggle§r — Enable or disable this feature
sayukiutils.help.copyuuid.set: §e  set [item]§r — Set the trigger item (from held item or item ID)
sayukiutils.help.copyuuid.reset: §e  reset§r — Reset trigger item to minecraft:stick
sayukiutils.help.darkmode.line: §e/sayukiutils darkmode§r — Dark mode shader for GUIs
sayukiutils.help.darkmode.title: §6/sayukiutils darkmode§r — Dark mode shader
sayukiutils.help.darkmode.desc: Applies a dark shader to all GUI screens with configurable profiles.
sayukiutils.help.darkmode.toggle: §e  toggle§r — Enable or disable this feature
